title: xylopia calophylla
intro: Xylopia calophylla, also known as the West African pepper, is a plant species in the Annonaceae family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xylopia calophylla include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
